generic_rules: Focus repairs on fixing type errors or unresolved identifiers within AGREE clauses.
Prioritize repairs that align helper declaration types with expression types.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `int`, `real`, and `bool` for scalar type declarations in AGREE.
Ensure all identifiers within AGREE expressions are resolvable within the AADL model or annex.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new package-qualified identifiers or dependencies not present in the AADL model.
Avoid adding architecture changes as a first response to AGREE validation errors.
